description_long: This is a detailed residential property set within a landscaped plot, featuring a central house surrounded by various outbuildings, paved walkways, and numerous trees and shrubs. The main house is rectangular with a flat roof and multiple large windows, suggesting a modern architectural style. The property includes a greenhouse, a garage or utility building, and a circular driveway, as well as a small garden area and a patio. The grounds are organized with clear pathways and open spaces, and the landscaping incorporates both deciduous and evergreen trees, as well as decorative planters. The house appears to have a single story, with a prominent main entrance and several secondary access points. The overall layout is spacious, with the house and outbuildings arranged for both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by landscaped gardens, outbuildings, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, central pathways, and landscaped gardens with trees and planters.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the greenhouse, garage, and additional outbuildings, with the main house partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large utility building, open yard, and the back of the main house.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a mix of trees and outbuildings around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, small steps, and a modest overhang, flanked by landscaping and paved paths.
